subject: Update on your mentor application
html:
An update on your OpenMentor application
About your application
Hi {{first_name}} — thank you for wanting to mentor and help others grow. After review, we can't add your profile to the OpenMentor catalog this time.
If you believe this was a mistake, just reply to this email and we'll take another look.
Questions? Just reply to this email. · openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for wanting to mentor and help others grow. After review, we can't add your profile to the OpenMentor catalog this time.

If you believe this was a mistake, just reply to this email and we'll take another look.

---
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
https://openmentor.io
